tax_filing.title: Annual corporate tax (IS) + monthly advance payments
tax_filing.summary: Corporate income tax filed annually with monthly advance payments (acomptes); standard rate 25%.

tax_filing.title: Annual filing to Greffe du Tribunal de Commerce
tax_filing.summary: All registered companies must file annual accounts with the commercial court registry.

vat_gst.title: French VAT — monthly/quarterly returns
vat_gst.summary: Standard 20% / 10% / 5.5% rates. Monthly returns for businesses above thresholds; quarterly for others. CA3 form via impots.gouv.fr.

e_invoicing.title: France B2B e-invoicing — Sep 2026 (large) / Sep 2027 (all)
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory B2B e-invoicing via Plateformes de Dématérialisation Partenaires (PDP). Receiving capability + large-enterprise issuance Sep 2026; all enterprises Sep 2027. Factur-X / UBL 2.1 / CII via Chorus Pro.

payroll.title: URSSAF / DSN monthly social filings
payroll.summary: EXTREME complexity: ~43% employer social contributions including pension, unemployment, transport, training, housing levies. Monthly DSN (Déclaration Sociale Nominative) filing.

local_gaap.title: Plan Comptable Général (PCG) — mandatory chart of accounts
local_gaap.summary: Mandatory 1-9 class structure; all French businesses must use PCG. Significant divergence from IFRS; SMBs use PCG for statutory accounts.

banking_payments.title: PSD2 + SEPA + strong open banking
banking_payments.summary: PSD2 open banking APIs across French banks; SEPA Credit Transfer/Direct Debit/Instant. Strong aggregator market (TrueLayer, Tink, Salt Edge).
